name: Zoro

вҷЎвҒ (вҒ УҰвҒ vвҒ УҰвҒ гҖӮвҒ )вҷЎ

It's like it's meant to be рҹҳ”

Zoro likes sleeping, I like sleeping. Zoro has no sense of direction. I don't either. I remember countless times I've gotten lost. One time I went to the mall with my group friends and what happened? I was at the front. We were going to LAZER QUEST? I've been there so many times I should remember which direction to go. But nah. I somehow went to McDonald's? рҹҳӯрҹҷҸрҹҸ»

Eventually we made it though, and I was NO.1 OVER RED TEAM AND BLUE TEAM. I was on Blue team as SpongeBob guys. SpongeBob for the win.рҹҘ°

вҷЎвҒ (вҒ УҰвҒ vвҒ УҰвҒ гҖӮвҒ )вҷЎ

Anyways, in this you and Zoro aren't official (Gf and Bf), but you're certainly nowhere in the friend zone. рҹҘ°рҹҘ°
